channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Senate confirms Marco Rubio as secretary of state, giving Trump the first member of his Cabinet
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Senate quickly confirmed Marco Rubio as secretary of state Monday, voting unanimously to give President Donald Trump the first member of his new Cabinet on Inauguration Day.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Senate panel advances Noem nomination for Homeland Security secretary
item.description: A Senate committee cleared President Trump's nominee to lead the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) with a bipartisan vote, paving the way for a Senate floor vote. The Senate Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs Committee advanced South Dakota Gov. Kristi Noem (R) by a 13-2 vote.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump signs executive order directing US withdrawal from the Paris climate agreement
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump signed an executive order Monday directing the United States to again withdraw from the landmark Paris climate agreement, dealing a blow to worldwide efforts to combat global warming and once again distancing the U.S. from its closest allies.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW DALY and SETH BORENSTEIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Inside the intimate inauguration: Close-up encounters between political rivals, some awkward
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A president’s inaugural address is typically a choreographed spectacle. A makeshift grandstand is erected next to the Capitol, hundreds of thousands of people line the National Mall and the images and words of the day endure for generations. This time was different.
item.dc:creator: FARNOUSH AMIRI, STEPHEN GROVES, JULIA NIKHINSON, and MARY CLARE JALONICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rubio unanimously confirmed as secretary of State, becoming Trump's first Cabinet official
item.description: Rubio’s confirmation vote passed with overwhelming bipartisan support, 99-0. Rubio also was able to cast a vote for himself.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump completes historic comeback, vowing to turn around nation in decline
item.description: President Trump completed a monumental political comeback on Monday, taking the oath of office for a second time and vowing to turn around a nation he insisted was in decline.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nevada Democrats congratulate, caution Trump as he starts 2nd term
item.description: Southern Nevada’s congressional delegation -- all Democrats -- congratulated and cautioned President Donald Trump as he began his second term Monday.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Republicans look to probe some who received last-day Biden pardons
item.description: Congressional Republicans are looking to press on in scrutinizing some of those who received pardons from former President Biden in the last hours of his presidency. “Implication is that they needed the pardons… So, let’s call them all before Congress and demand the truth,” Rep.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden commutes sentence for Indigenous activist Leonard Peltier, convicted in killing of FBI agents
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Indigenous activist Leonard Peltier will return home nearly half a century after he was imprisoned for the 1975 killings of two FBI agents.
item.dc:creator: COLLEEN LONG, ZEKE MILLER, JOHN HANNA and STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden endures painful but active last day of presidency
item.description: When President Biden walked through the Capitol on Monday with mere minutes left in his presidency, a reporter asked how he was feeling.
item.dc:creator: Amie Parnes, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump's communication led to second presidency: Sam Donaldson
item.description: He suggested some of what Trump said highlighted the starkest departure from a past administration since Herbert Hoover and Franklin Roosevelt.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Trump, Newsom clash over wildfires, but California governor says he'll work with president
item.description: After President Trump criticizes California Gov. Newsom over the Los Angeles area wildfires during his inauguration address, the Democratic governor says he'll look for "common ground" with the new administration.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hakeem Jeffries the 'real future' of Democrats: Geraldo
item.description: New York U.S. Rep. and House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries is the most viable Democrat in Washington, Geraldo Rivera believes.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: What is an executive order? A look at Trump's tool for quickly reshaping government
item.description: An incoming president signing a flurry of executive orders is standard practice. Executive orders allow a president to wield power without action from Congress. But there are also limits to what orders can achieve.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Florida officials react to Trump inauguration
item.description: Donald Trump was sworn in as the 47th President of the United States on Monday. Here's how Florida officials are responding.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump national security adviser pick Waltz resigns from House, shrinking GOP majority
item.description: Trump tapped Waltz, a House lawmaker and former Green Beret, in the fall to serve as his national security adviser.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump declares ‘Golden Age’ in America in inaugural address
item.description: President Trump on Monday declared it was the beginning of a new “Golden Age" in America, pledging to restore a country that he said had been decimated by the previous administration as he officially took the oath of office for his second White House term.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Trump vows 'new era of national success,' says America's 'decline is over' in inaugural address
item.description: President Trump said on Monday that a "tide of change" is sweeping the U.S., moments after he was sworn in as the 47th president of the United States.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Inauguration Day Latest: Trump issues pardons for Jan. 6 rioters and signs more executive actions
item.description: Donald Trump has been sworn in as the 47th president of the United States, taking charge as Republicans claim unified control of Washington and set out to reshape the country’s institutions.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Melania dons hat at Trump inauguration, struggles to kiss Trump
item.description: First lady Melania Trump wore a navy and ivory ensemble by American designer Adam Lippes for the inauguration ceremony.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Indigenous activist Leonard Peltier granted clemency by President Biden
item.description: The outgoing administration has released Leonard Peltier from prison. Numerous activists and tribal officials have requested the release of Peltier, whom they believe to be innocent of killing two FBI agents in 1975.
item.dc:creator: Allison Herrera and Melissa Olson, MPR News

item.title: Biden spends his final full day in office in South Carolina. It helped him become president
item.description: Joe Biden is spending his final full day in office Sunday in South Carolina, a state that holds special meaning after his commanding win in the 2020 Democratic primary there set him up to achieve his life's goal of being elected president of the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Civil rights leaders and King family mark MLK Day as a special call to action as Trump takes office
item.description: Events honoring Martin Luther King Jr.’s legacy and advocating for his vision of a just, nonviolent society will occur the same day as Donald Trump's second presidential inauguration.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Outgoing Interior Secretary Deb Haaland hands off closer ties with Indian Country
item.description: Deb Haaland, the country's first Indigenous cabinet secretary, used her term at the Interior Department to make what activists say is irreversible impact in recognizing the painful history of the government's treatment Native Americans.
item.dc:creator: Kirk Siegler, MPR News

item.title: Gavel in or gavel out? DeSantis calls for amendment reform
item.description: There are still a lot of questions about Governor Ron DeSantis' call for a special session in less than two weeks.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Moody announces Senate plans, DeSantis names AG replacement
item.description: After weeks of speculation, Gov. Ron DeSantis appointed Ashley Moody to replace Marco Rubio, who plans to leave his senate seat.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Scott Stringer announces run for New York City mayor
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Former New York City Comptroller Scott Stringer is joining the 2025 race for New York City mayor, he announced on PIX11 News on Thursday. He has a long political career, previously serving as the Manhattan borough president and a New York State Assembly member.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, PIX 11

item.title: Cortez Masto leads Nevada Democrats in renewed effort against nuclear waste dump
item.description: Nevada's Democratic U.S. senators and representatives in Congress reintroduced the Nuclear Waste Informed Consent Act on Wednesday, gearing up for possible renewed efforts to put a nuclear dump in the state.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: End to daylight saving time among bills for 2025 Nevada Legislature
item.description: A Republican lawmaker who represents parts of six rural Nevada counties is sponsoring a bill to take the state off daylight saving time — one of the 200 bills written so far.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: DeSantis hopes incoming Trump administration will kickstart crackdown on illegal immigration
item.description: Gov. Ron DeSantis will be speaking in Winter Haven on Wednesday morning at the Polk County Sheriff's Office.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: County Board of Supervisors votes to hold special election to fill District 1 seat
item.description: In a swift and unanimous vote, the County Board of Supervisors has agreed to a special election to fill the vacancy left behind by Nora Vargas.
item.dc:creator: Juliette Vara, Fox 5

item.title: Nevada elections leader urges real-time efficiency over changing deadlines
item.description: The influx of mail-in ballots collected on Election Day led to delays in tabulation across Nevada, not the number of ballots received in the days after, Democratic Nevada Secretary of State Cisco Aguilar said ahead of the legislative session.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Live updates: Democrats turn up heat on Hegseth as Republican alleges hypocrisy
item.description: Defense Secretary nominee Pete Hegseth appeared before the Senate Armed Services Committee on Tuesday, the first of President-elect Trump's Cabinet candidates to face confirmation.
item.dc:creator: The Hill staff, Fox 5
